commit.message:
ping_agent, auth_agent: increase batch size from 500 to 2000

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix crawler pipeline: remove broken partition filter and fix Flyway version

- Remove partition-based URL filtering from CrawlScheduler that silently
  dropped URLs dequeued by the wrong downloader instance
- Remove incompatible flyway-database-postgresql:10.8.1 dependency that
  crashed url-seen (AbstractMethodError with flyway-core 9.x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ping_agent: remove status updates, delegate to auth_agent

Ping agent now only records metrics and updates last_ping_at.
Status (online/offline) is managed exclusively by auth_agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove obsolete version attribute from docker-compose.yml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Gradle SIGSEGV crash in Docker builds on ARM (Apple Silicon)

Switch build stage from eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine to eclipse-temurin:21-jdk
to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Virtual Root, Shared-with-me navigation, and Owner identity column

- Ctx now starts at __VIRTUAL_ROOT__ (Home) instead of My Drive
- api.list_children() handles __SHARED__ to query sharedWithMe folders
- Added ownedByMe to Drive API fields for ownership detection
- colors.style_for_item() colors unowned items pink; removed duplicate folder check
- display.print_table() adds Owner email column between Type and Modified

commit.message:
fix: Friday holding-time gate, Brier stall, NG microstructure noise (#1215)

- Add per-commodity position_close_hour/minute to commodity_overrides
  (KC/CC: 13:05 ET, NG: 14:05 ET). The default 11:00 ET was blocking
  Friday signal_early for KC/CC and signal_open for NG ~2h too early.

- Fix Brier backfill_from_resolved_csv() returning 0 immediately when
  agent_accuracy_structured.csv is missing. Pass 3 (council_history
  resolution) was unreachable, causing 0 predictions to resolve.

- Lower NG microstructure depth_drop_pct from 0.50 to 0.35 to reduce
  alert noise (SNR 0.000 with 40+ daily alerts).

Co-authored-by: Claude Code Bot <claude-code@coffee-bot.dev>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CORS: proxy Appwrite calls through Vercel API route

Direct browser requests to server.innsimulation.com were blocked by
CORS (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://localhost). Moving execution
calls to a Vercel serverless proxy at /api/multa-exec fixes this and
also keeps the Appwrite API keys server-side instead of exposed in the
browser bundle.

- api/multa-exec.js: POST creates execution, GET ?id=xxx polls it
- ConsultarMultaPage: remove client-side API key usage, update poll URL
- VITE_MULTA_API_URL updated to /api/multa-exec in Vercel env

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Format E paste parsing: 맵약자 선수A[WIN][LOSE]선수B without 🆚

Supports compact format like "1️⃣녹 예리✅⬜복실" where map abbreviation
precedes players and WIN/LOSE marks appear adjacent without a 🆚 separator.

commit.message:
fix: add fsGroup to paperless-gpt for PVC write access

The prompts PVC is owned by root but the container runs as UID 1000.
Adding fsGroup: 1000 makes the PVC group-writable so the app can copy
default prompt templates on first startup.

commit.message:
Feature: Resume gaps analysis Q&A flow + full Drushim integration

- Add POST /api/resume/analyze-gaps endpoint: GPT-4o-mini compares resume
  against job description and returns missing requirements with targeted
  questions to surface hidden candidate experience
- Update POST /api/resume/rewrite-diff to accept optional extra_context
  (Q&A answers) and incorporate them into both AI rewrite passes
- Fix prompt engineering: confirmed additions appear before resume text
  with explicit MUST-incorporate rules; _evaluate_and_correct also receives
  extra_context as safety net to prevent stripping added content
- Add multi-step Q&A flow in JobMatch.jsx: gaps check → Q&A form →
  generate diff with answers woven in → diff viewer with edit-and-regenerate
- Add intra-line character diff (~ modified lines with red/green highlights)
- Fix Drushim job URL extraction: use div.open-job a[href] not listingid attr
- Fix lazy full-description fetch with correct selectors (div.job-details,
  div.job-requirements)
- Fix 401 auto-logout: clear localStorage and redirect to /login on any
  auth failure across all fetch calls
- Fix wrong localStorage key in JobDetails.jsx ('token' → 'hirematex_auth_token')
- Fix Profile.jsx and JobMatch.jsx to use getToken() from useAuth hook

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: axion field physics accuracy — scalar aF² coupling, underdamped oscillation

The QCD axion's pseudoscalar aFF̃ ∝ E·B coupling vanishes identically in
2D (E in-plane, B perpendicular). Replace with the scalar aF² coupling
L = -(1+g·a)F²/4, which is the simplest ALP interaction that works in
2D and correctly modifies all EM forces via a position-dependent α.

Key changes:
- Replace critical damping (Q=0.5) with underdamped oscillation (Q=1/g=5)
  so the field oscillates like real axion dark matter
- Add AXION_COUPLING=0.2 (g) that controls source (g·q²), gradient force
  (-g·q²·∇a), EM modulation (α_eff=α(1+g·a)), and damping (g·m_a) from
  a single parameter with the elegant relation g·Q=1
- Lower AXION_A_MAX from 8 to 2 (keeps axMod in [0,3] range)
- Update reference page, tooltips, preset description, and docs

commit.message:
fix: backfill fully overwrites signup status + clears stale data

Previous backfill only set note/source_url without updating status,
causing misleading notes (e.g. "I'm out" on an "in" signup from a
different message). Now: clears old backfill data first, then fully
overwrites status + note + source with timestamp comparison so the
latest message for each game+player wins.

commit.message:
Add contrastive pretraining for multi-modal stock prediction

Implements unsupervised contrastive learning (SimCLR-style) for learning
robust feature representations before supervised finetuning.

Key components:
- TimeSeriesAugmenter: temporal jitter, feature masking, Gaussian noise
- ContrastiveProjectionHead: 3-layer MLP projecting to contrastive space
- ContrastiveMultiModalModel: wrapper with InfoNCE loss computation
- Two-phase training: pretrain encoder, then freeze and finetune heads

Also fixes critical bugs in walk_forward_training.py:
- Skip tickers not in prices file (was causing 30%+ zero targets)
- Use trading day offsets for target computation (not calendar days)
- Proper future date filtering based on trading day availability
- Scale encoder output dimensions proportionally with hidden_dim

CLI args: --contrastive-pretrain, --contrastive-epochs, --contrastive-lr,
          --contrastive-temperature, --no-freeze-encoder

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
